title: Eva — 'Joe, YOU TOOK it!' (Joe guilty)
prompt: Close shot. @Eva kneels facing @Joe the Pomeranian on the living room rug. Small hands ON HIPS, eyebrows PULL TOGETHER. The little dog SITS, ears FLAT DOWN, eyes wide and guilty, tongue PEEKS out apologetically. TAIL gives one tiny wag. The girl's expression softens slightly. Warm morning daylight. @Eva (gentle scolding): "Joe... you took it."
